'''Saskapeg''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Cadinth]] and its government, the [[Cadinth Oligarchy]].<ref name="Article" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="HNN date 25">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|jediwatch/1359_2.html|Cadinth Loyalty Uncertain After Jedi Death}} is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:5:9," which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> when the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was clashing with a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|militant separatist faction]],<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Oligarchy]] took the Republic's side. That changed when a pro-Separatist [[Saskapeg uprising|uprising]] occurred in Saskapeg, leading to the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Bodis-Ker Vitan]], the planet's [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Watchman]]. The incident prompted the government to withdraw the world's support of the Republic, with [[Prime Oligarch]] [[Rankwin Fopow]] later recalling those statements and declaring it was "firmly undecided" between the groups.<ref name="Article" />

==Behind the scenes==
Saskapeg was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 55|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #55'']], an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="Article" /> that was published on [[May 9]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN55 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6774521|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-05-09|time=4:55 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> The article that references the city, entitled "Cadinth Loyalty Uncertain After Jedi Death,"<ref name="Article" /> was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
